revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Container Category:11]][[sn:}} {{Portal|Biography}} {| class="toccolours" style="margin:1em auto;" | style="text-align:center;" |
'''[[Wikipedia:Classification|Classification]]:''' {{#if: {{{ParentCountry|}}} | [[:Category:11]][[sn::{{{ParentCountry}}}{{!}}{{{ParentCountry}}}]]:}} [[:Category:11]][[sn::{{{Country}}}|{{{Country}}}]]: [[:Category:11]][[sn::{{{Nationality}}} people|People]]: '''By occupation'''
''also:'' [[:Category:11]][[sn::People|People]]: [[:Category:11]][[sn::People by occupation|By occupation]]: [[:Category:11]][[sn::People by nationality and occupation|Nationalities]]: {{#if: {{{ParentNationality|}}} | [[:Category:11]][[sn::{{{ParentNationality}}} people by occupation{{!}}{{{ParentNationality}}}]]:}} '''{{{Nationality}}} '''
|} See also: :[[:Category:11]][[sn::Occupations]] :[[:Category:11]][[sn::People by occupation and nationality]] {{#if: {{{ParentCountry|}}} | | [[sn::People by nationality and occupation]] }} [[sn::{{{Nationality}}} people| Occupation]] [[sn::qq]] {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Container Category:11]][[sn:}} {{Portal|Biography}} {| class="toccolours" style="margin:1em auto;" | style="text-align:center;" |
'''[[Wikipedia:Classification|Classification]]:''' {{#if: {{{ParentCountry|}}} | [[:Category:11]][[sn::{{{ParentCountry}}}{{!}}{{{ParentCountry}}}]]:}} [[:Category:11]][[sn::{{{Country}}}|{{{Country}}}]]: [[:Category:11]][[sn::{{{Nationality}}} people|People]]: '''By occupation'''

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 14 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Container Category:11]]:''' {{#if: {{{ParentCountry|}}} | [[:Category:11]]:}} [[:Category:11]]: [[:Category:11]]: '''By occupation'''

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23991619004|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
